# BlackBeard Editor — Pirate Markdown Editor for macOS

> BlackBeard Editor (beardyeditor.com) is a native macOS markdown editor with a pirate theme.
> Author: Konstantin Shkurko (Константин Шкурко).

## Canonical

- Product: BlackBeard Editor
- Domain: https://beardyeditor.com/
- Platform: macOS
- Languages: en, ru, de, fr, es

## Key pages

- Home (EN): https://beardyeditor.com/en/
- Guide (EN): https://beardyeditor.com/en/guide.html
- Home (RU): https://beardyeditor.com/ru/

## Tone

Marketing uses playful pirate humor; the app is free to download. "Pirate it here" means legal free download, not software piracy of paid goods.

## Author

Konstantin Shkurko — creator of BlackBeard Editor.
